zh.lifeSummary: 當Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles於1113年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾莫文時，他的父親GilleBride MacGille Adomnan33歲，母親Brigid Sigurdsdottir14歲。他於大約1140年與Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir在曼島結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1164年登記服兵役。他去世於1164年1月1日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年51歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾薩德爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles于1113年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾莫文时，他的父亲GilleBride MacGille Adomnan33岁，母亲Brigid Sigurdsdottir14岁。他于大约1140年与Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir在曼岛结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1164年登记服兵役。他去世于1164年1月1日在苏格兰雷福福爾享年51岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾薩德爾。

nameMeanings.name: Somerled
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Sumarlíðr, probably originally a byname meaning ‘summer traveller’. This is a Highland name, borne by the founder of the powerful and widespread Clan Macdonald, Lords of the Isles from the 12th to the 15th century, and it is still occasionally bestowed on members of Clan Macdonald and its septs.

variants.name: Summerlad
meanings: Variant spelling of Somerled , being taken by folk etymology as derived from the words summer and lad.

en.lifeSummary: When Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles was born in 1113, in Morven, Argyll, Scotland, his father, GilleBride MacGille Adomnan, was 33 and his mother, Brigid Sigurdsdottir, was 14. He married Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir about 1140, in Isle of Man. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1164. He died on 1 January 1164, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 51, and was buried in Saddell, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles est né en 1113, à Morven, Argyll, Écosse, son père, GilleBride MacGille Adomnan, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Brigid Sigurdsdottir, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir environ 1140, à Île de Man. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1164. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1164, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Saddell, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles 1113 in Morven, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater GilleBride MacGille Adomnan 33 und seine Mutter Brigid Sigurdsdottir 14. Er hat um 1140 in Isle of Man Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1164 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 1. Januar 1164 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Saddell, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles è nato il nel 1113 nel Morven, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, GilleBride MacGille Adomnan, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Brigid Sigurdsdottir, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir circa 1140, nel Isola di Man. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1164. Morì il 1 gennaio 1164, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Saddell, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Islesが1113年にスコットランドアルグイルモーベンで生まれた時，父GilleBride MacGille Adomnanは33歳，母Brigid Sigurdsdottirは14歳であった。約1140年にマン島でRagnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottirと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1164年に兵役登録をした。彼は1164年1月1日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで51歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルサッドエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles(이)가 1113년 스컷랜드 아그이 모르븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 GilleBride MacGille Adomnan(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Brigid Sigurdsdottir(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1140년 맨섬에서 Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1164년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1164년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 사데에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles nasceu em 1113, em Morven, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, GilleBride MacGille Adomnan, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Brigid Sigurdsdottir, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir aproximadamente 1140, em Ilha de Man. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1164. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1164, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Saddell, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles родился в 1113 г. в местности морвен, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени GilleBride MacGille Adomnan было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Brigid Sigurdsdottir, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir около 1140 г. в местности Остров Мэн. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1164 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 1 января 1164 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности садделл, аргилл, Шотландия.

sm.from 1158 to 1164: mai le 1158 e o'o I le 1164

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles nació en 1113, en Morven, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, GilleBride MacGille Adomnan, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Brigid Sigurdsdottir, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir aproximadamente 1140, en Isla de Man. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1164. Murió el 1 de enero de 1164, en Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Saddell, Argyll, Scotland.
